A golden scalloped dish, initially holding white teardrop-shaped beads, is then introduced. Using a pink-tipped tool, the person meticulously arranges these beads in a neat vertical line along the glued area of the clip. The text 'Archana ki duniya arts and crafts' remains visible at the bottom of the frame throughout the entire process.

entity_library.Golden circular ring: A plain, golden circular ring being wrapped with bright pink yarn to create a textured, decorative base, with the yarn being woven both around the circumference and across the interior in a radial pattern.
entity_library.Scissors: A pair of scissors with a metallic blade, used to trim the ends of the pink tassel to create a neat, fringed appearance.
entity_library.White pearls: Small, round white pearls being picked up and glued onto the intersections of the pink yarn web on the golden ring, adding decorative accents.
entity_library.Pink tassel: A handmade tassel created from pink yarn, wrapped around a small object, tied, trimmed, and later combined with a white tassel and a pearl for decoration.
entity_library.White tassel: A handmade tassel made from white yarn, created similarly to the pink tassel, and combined with it to form a two-toned decorative element.
entity_library.Pearl string: A small string with a single white pearl threaded onto it, attached to the pink tassel to add a decorative accent.
